success_surface: Successfully solved subset-sum problem with conditional formatting, preserved data integrity, handled sheet deletion safely, and verified output
effective_behaviors: Exhaustive iterative search strategy for finding valid value combinations within target ranges
Floating-point tolerance through rounding before numeric comparisons
Pre-operation safety checks (sheet existence, directory creation) before modifications
Post-save verification pattern (reload saved file to confirm changes persisted)
Progressive search expansion when initial approaches fail (try different combination sizes)
Separation of calculation logic from modification logic (find solution, then apply changes)
evidence: Agent tried combination sizes from 1 to N systematically until finding valid sum in range
Used round() on float values before summation to handle precision issues
Checked 'Sheet3' in wb.sheetnames before deletion instead of unconditionally deleting
Created output directory with os.makedirs(exist_ok=True) before wb.save()
Reloaded saved workbook to verify C2 value and green fill colors were applied correctly
When first search returned 0 combinations, agent expanded search scope rather than failing

memory_items.title: Subset Sum Search Pattern
memory_items.lesson: Use iterative combination searches of increasing size to find numeric solutions within target ranges
memory_items.generalization: For tasks requiring specific value combinations, implement systematic searches starting with smaller subsets, expanding progressively until constraints are satisfied.

memory_items.title: Numeric Comparison Safety
memory_items.lesson: Round floating-point values before summing/comparing to avoid precision-related failures
memory_items.generalization: Always normalize numeric precision (via rounding or tolerance thresholds) before performing arithmetic comparisons in spreadsheet calculations.

memory_items.title: Defensive Workbook Operations
memory_items.lesson: Check sheet/cell existence before modifying or deleting to prevent runtime errors
memory_items.generalization: Before any workbook modification (delete sheet, update cell), verify the target exists to maintain execution robustness.

memory_items.title: Output Verification Protocol
memory_items.lesson: Reload saved workbooks to verify changes persisted correctly before considering task complete
memory_items.generalization: Implement post-write verification by loading the output file separately and confirming critical values/styles were saved properly.

memory_items.title: Directory Preparation
memory_items.lesson: Ensure output directories exist before writing files to avoid save failures
memory_items.generalization: Create necessary parent directories using idempotent operations before saving any output files.

memory_items.title: Search Strategy Recovery
memory_items.lesson: When initial search fails, expand search parameters rather than terminating prematurely
memory_items.generalization: If primary solution methods yield no results, implement fallback strategies that broaden search scope (more combinations, looser constraints, etc.).

edits.content:
## Advanced Task Patterns

### Subset-Sum and Combination Problems
- Use iterative searches of increasing combination sizes when finding value subsets that meet numeric targets
- Normalize floating-point precision (via rounding) before performing arithmetic comparisons
- Expand search scope progressively when initial attempts don't find valid solutions

### Operational Safety
- Check workbook objects (sheets, cells) exist before modifying or deleting them
- Create output directories before saving files using idempotent directory creation
- Reload saved workbooks to verify changes persisted correctly after write operations

### Error-Recovery Strategy
- When searches return empty results, broaden constraints before abandoning the approach
- Separate calculation/find phase from application phase (find valid values first, then apply changes)
